name: Consumer Repo Extra Long Run
description: A real consumer-repo task runs for hours, crosses multiple resumes and validation boundaries, and must stay coherent until a correct stop condition appears.
objective: Measure whether Campfire can stay mechanically correct across an afternoon-scale product task rather than a harness-only task.
success_criteria: The run remains coherent across at least five milestones and two resumes.
At least one failed validation or real blocker is handled without silent drift.
The final stop reason is correct and explicit instead of guessed through.
candidate_objective: Build the playable single-player Loot Goblins vertical slice covering camp, squad setup, biome selection, auto-battle runs, rewards, and return-to-camp progression.
